chunks.title: Appointment of Bezalel and Oholiab
chunks.reason: Yahweh speaks to Moses appointing artisans for the tabernacle.

chunks.title: Command to Keep the Sabbath
chunks.reason: Yahweh commands Israel to observe the Sabbath as a covenant sign.

chunks.title: Giving of the Tablets
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing Moses receiving the stone tablets.
